brandStatement.title: A FAIRER GAME
brandStatement.description: The discovery ecosystem for Minecraft and Hytale servers. Built for real players, real trust, and the community.

benefitItems.title: CROSS-GAME POTENTIAL
benefitItems.description: Designed for Minecraft, Hytale, and future worlds.

page.subtitle: Join the verified ecosystem for Minecraft and Hytale.

form.legalDisclaimer: By joining, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. We never post to connected accounts without permission.
form.marketingConsentLabel: I want to receive product updates and marketing emails from FirstSpawn.

activation.instruction: Please activate your account by clicking on the link provided in it.
activation.message: You will soon receive an email on the following address:
activation.providerWarning: Services like Hotmail, Yahoo, AOL often mistakenly identify the activation email as spam!
activation.spamWarning: Please remember to check your spam and trash box!!!
activation.title: CHECK YOUR INBOX

cta.title: Ready to find your
cta.subtitle: Stop wasting time on pay-to-win billboards. Discover communities backed by verified uptime and real player retention.

brand.name: FIRSTSPAWN
brand.description: The infrastructure for reliable voxel multiplayer discovery. We prioritize performance data over paid placements.

bottom.copyright: © {year} FirstSpawn. Not affiliated with Hypixel Studios or Mojang.

cookieConsent.title: COOKIE SETTINGS
cookieConsent.introPrefix: Our website uses essential cookies and limited technical data to keep FirstSpawn secure, maintain your session, remember language preferences, and protect core platform functionality.
cookieConsent.introSuffix: about how these settings affect your experience.
cookieConsent.consentPrefix: With your permission, FirstSpawn may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform, improve discovery flows, and make ranking, trust, and onboarding systems more reliable. See our
cookieConsent.consentSuffix: for more detail. Analytics providers may act as
cookieConsent.essentialDescription: Required for account security, session continuity, language settings, and the basic operation of the platform. These remain enabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Helps us measure traffic, understand feature usage, and improve product decisions without turning discovery into paid placement.
cookieConsent.manageDescription: With your permission, FirstSpawn may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform and to improve discovery, trust, and onboarding systems. Essential cookies remain enabled because they support the secure and reliable operation of the site.
cookieConsent.categoryUnavailable: Personalization and marketing cookies are not currently active on FirstSpawn.

scene.alt: A dusk overworld vista with a spawn overlook, beacon tower, ruined portal arch, scanning signal trails, and the FirstSpawn scout familiar surveying the route ahead.

discoveryConsole.title: FIND A SERVER WORTH JOINING
discoveryConsole.subtitle: Search live Minecraft and Hytale listings by real activity, freshness, region, and fit. FirstSpawn opens on discovery because the useful signal should come before the pitch.
discoveryConsole.ownerLabel: Run a community? Claim your path through the owner console.

serverPreview.emptyDescription: No public servers are available from the API right now. Discovery stays the primary path, and this console will populate from live catalog data as targets come online.

problemSolution.title: DISCOVERY: REDEFINED
problemSolution.subtitle: Compare servers by real activity, freshness, and fit instead of paid placement noise.

items.title: SYNTHETIC VANITY
items.description: Rankings built on bribes and bot-loops. Synthetic metrics that mask a server's true pulse.

items.title: ROTTING ARCHITECTURE
items.description: Static phonebooks for ghosts. Disconnected directories that have not evolved since 2012.

items.title: DEEP-PULSE INTEGRITY
items.description: FSVotifier-backed reputation. Real-time metrics that prove community health and trust.

items.title: NEURAL DISCOVERY
items.description: A living bridge. We connect players directly to the hidden gems that matter.

features.title: WHY FIRSTSPAWN?
features.subtitle: Built differently for players who want fresh signals, real activity, and server fit before hype.

items.title: VERIFIED UPTIME
items.description: No more fake online counts. Our bots verify every server's status in real-time.

items.title: PROOF OF PLAY
items.description: Reviews backed by actual playtime. Only real players can leave ratings.

items.title: CROSS-PLATFORM ID
items.description: One identity across Minecraft, Hytale, and beyond. Sync your journey.

items.title: GUILD SYSTEM
items.description: Form alliances, compete on leaderboards, and unlock exclusive rewards.

newsletter.title: GET LAUNCH UPDATES
newsletter.description: Follow the beta as discovery, reputation, and server-owner tools come online.

page.title: DISCOVER WORLDS
page.subtitle: Find your next adventure. Browse verified servers ranked by real player data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: This Terms of Service page is being finalized. By creating an account, you agree to FirstSpawn platform usage rules, account responsibility, and acceptable conduct policies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This Privacy Policy page is being finalized. By creating an account, you acknowledge data processing for account security, product operations, and communications preferences.

consolePage.title: CONSOLE
consolePage.description: Welcome back, {username}. Personal server analytics, verification controls, and account command tools will live in this panel.

lootPage.title: MY LOOT
lootPage.description: {username}, your progression inventory hub is now unlocked. Reward drops, puzzle keys, and badge claims will appear here.
